description: A color candid photograph showing a group of uniformed police officers (NYPD-style dark blue uniforms with peaked caps and badges) walking along a tree-lined drive, apparently on the White House grounds, beside a dark armored/tactical bus or van. A man in plain clothes stands near equipment and netting at left. The setting is leafy and outdoors with a brick building visible through the trees. There is no graphic text or design overlay (OCR returned only noise), so this is a documentary event photograph rather than a designed meme. It accompanies the White House tweet honoring police and peace officers during Police Week.
